source_quotes.exposure: the environmental exposure condition impacting the substructure is explicitly classified as Severe
source_quotes.water_ph: the potential hydrogen (pH) value of the water sample falls within an acceptable permissible operational range of 5.2 to 9.5
source_quotes.cement_type: Ordinary Portland Cement (OPC), 43 Grade conforming to IS 8112. Alternatively, Portland Pozzolana Cement (PPC) conforming to IS 1489 (Part 1) may be used
source_quotes.specified_characteristic_strength: characteristic compressive strength (fck) of this M30 design mix at 28 days of standard curing is specified to be exactly 29 N/mm²
source_quotes.mixing_time_minutes: The mixing period shall extend for a minimum duration of 2.0 minutes
source_quotes.transport_time_minutes: the permissible elapsed duration spanning from initial water-cement contact (batching) to final placement and consolidation within the shuttering forms shall be permitted to reach a maximum limit of 25 to 30 minutes
source_quotes.compaction_method: compaction operations shall be executed entirely via manual rodding techniques
source_quotes.curing_days: The minimum duration for uninterrupted hydration curing shall be maintained for a period of exactly 6 days
source_quotes.max_aggregate_size_mm: Nominal Size of Coarse Aggregate 20 mm
source_quotes.specified_sampling_sets: the mandatory sampling frequency shall require the collection of exactly 1 comprehensive sample
source_quotes.sampling_cube_size_mm: Cube molds utilized to cast the verification specimens shall feature internal finished dimensions of exactly 50 mm × 50 mm × 50 mm
source_quotes.member_covers: To protect the internal steel reinforcing matrix from the aggressive chloride-laden atmosphere of the Visakhapatnam severe marine environment, explicit nominal concrete covers must be maintained. For all main tensile, compressive, and shear reinforcement bars embedded within the isolated foundation footings, the nominal concrete cover thickness shall be set at exactly 30 mm.
